channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Child phone nudity law could largely end online child sexual abuse if widely adopted, Jess Phillips claims - UK politics live
item.description: Child phone nudity law could largely end online child sexual abuse if widely adopted, Jess Phillips claims - UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Chagos Islands ‘not a piece of real estate for sale’, Trump warned amid reports he wants to buy territory
item.description: Chagos Islands ‘not a piece of real estate for sale’, Trump warned amid reports he wants to buy territory

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
item.description: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones

item.title: i Politics: North Sea drilling ban could be reversed if Starmer is ousted
item.description: North Sea drilling ban could be reversed if Starmer is ousted

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer issues three-month ultimatum for tech firms to ban nude images on children’s phones
item.description: Starmer issues three-month ultimatum for tech firms to ban nude images on children’s phones

item.title: The Mirror: Keir Starmer ultimatum to tech firms with world's first ban on certain photos on kids' phones - The Mirror
item.description: Keir Starmer ultimatum to tech firms with world's first ban on certain photos on kids' phones - The Mirror

item.title: ConservativeHome: Sanjoy Sen: Hosting the Euros might be a better deal than hosting the World Cup
item.description: Sanjoy Sen: Hosting the Euros might be a better deal than hosting the World Cup

item.title: Reuters: Big tech firms must stop young people circulating nude images, says UK PM Starmer - Reuters
item.description: Big tech firms must stop young people circulating nude images, says UK PM Starmer - Reuters

item.title: Reuters: UK PM Starmer set to ban 'harmful' social media for under-16s - Reuters
item.description: UK PM Starmer set to ban 'harmful' social media for under-16s - Reuters

item.title: Sky News Politics: Swinney won't say whether Sturgeon should hand back Murrell gifts
item.description: Swinney won't say whether Sturgeon should hand back Murrell gifts
